• Joke Generator

Disclaimer: Chuck Jokes is a website that allows the user to generate a list with satirical factoids about American martial artist and actor Chuck Norris, who features in many great movies and has become an Internet phenomenon, widespread in popular culture.

To obtain a list of facts, the user should go through these simple steps:

Step 1. Select amount of jokes

Step 2. (Optional) Select a category

Step 3. Click the "GENERATE" button.

type a number or use up&down arrows
